subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Muḥammad! Thou art mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One. Shouldst thou discover the fruit of this utterance, thou wouldst, as long as life endureth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی محمد ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور اگر ثمره اینفقره را بیابی تا جان داری بلک
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
